thesis: Games are a retention layer tied to live content, not a standalone acquisition thesis.

items.title: Headline Match
items.description: Sort current headlines into the right section before the timer runs out.
items.prompt: Use the latest News, Sports, and Tech items from News, Sports, and Tech.

items.title: Timeline Sort
items.description: Re-order live events from soonest to latest using the active event deck.
items.prompt: Use active live events such as Aurora watch, Global earthquake watch, NASA live programming.

items.title: World Quiz
items.description: Answer quick questions pulled from current live topics and sources.
items.prompt: Focus on Earthquakes and source-backed facts.

items.title: Rapid Reaction
items.description: Tap through a short focus drill tied to the live-event clock.
items.prompt: Use a short timer tied to the CLPS Flight: Astrobotic Griffin-1 cadence.

items.title: Sudoku
items.description: A slower logic game for longer dwell time between live checks.
items.prompt: Keep this as a replayable support mode inside the Games section.

items.title: Memory
items.description: Quick pattern recall with XLB symbols and event cues.
items.prompt: Keep this as a replayable support mode inside the Games section.
